blended.narrative: Stratton is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 54°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 58°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 8" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
